page_subtitle: Club tees, race jerseys and supporter gear. Pickup at the Eagles Nest.
info_banner: **Free pickup at the Eagles Nest** on Tuesday gate nights · Race jerseys are made-to-order via Ace Race (allow 4-6 weeks) · All proceeds support the club.

products.name: Eastfield Eagles Race Jersey - Black
products.description: Personalised long-sleeve race jersey from Ace Race. Custom name and number on the back. Made-to-order, 4-6 week lead time.

footer_note: All proceeds support track maintenance and club programs
